Water 5 trees and gather 10 sturdy sticks to complete the first set of challenges. After that, speak with Bulbasaur and choose "Do you need anything?" to unlock the recipe for the Straw Bed.</td>
  </tr>

<tr>
    <th>4</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430490/5ad9a4b6773efc21b496b42b8f99e59b.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Straw Bed Recipe" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430490/5ad9a4b6773efc21b496b42b8f99e59b.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Use the Workbench to craft the Straw Bed. You will need 2 Leaves to create the bed. Place the Straw Bed within the boundaries Bulbasaur's habitat. Talk to Bulbasaur after placing the bed to complete the request.


</td>
  </tr>
<tr>
    <th>5</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430511/255da9f11803fb7817df1dc0fa53bd8e.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="New Challenges in PC" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430511/255da9f11803fb7817df1dc0fa53bd8e.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<hr class="a-table__line">
Interact with the PC to check the new Challenges that have been added.


</td>
  </tr>
<tr>
    <th>6</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430517/12be150859688ede940ba2bfdb370aba.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Professor Tangrowth" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430517/12be150859688ede940ba2bfdb370aba.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Professor Tangrowth and he will mention about building houses. Go to the PC and purchase a Leaf Den Kit from the Shop.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>7</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430524/cc42547049a21b9f98c818eca9baf7c6.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Building the Leaf Den" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430524/cc42547049a21b9f98c818eca9baf7c6.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Place the Leaf Den Kit on the area and gather 3 Sturdy Sticks and 3 Leaves. Have Timburr and another Pokemon follow you and lead them to the Leaf Den Kit construction area. Inspect the Leaf Den and select the Pokemon and the required materials to construct the den. <br> <br> <span class="a-red">Constructing a building takes real-world hours to complete</span>, you can skip this by changing your Switch 2's system time.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>8</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430533/b13835dcbf213b7804582bc3df1c7632.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Furnitures inside Leaf Den" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430533/b13835dcbf213b7804582bc3df1c7632.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<tr>

    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430536/bea03ad75709ca3bf2f58e7bb0f754fb.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Charmander Celebration" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430536/bea03ad75709ca3bf2f58e7bb0f754fb.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Talk to Charmander and they will suggest to throw a celebration after building the house. Bring them to Professor Tangrowth and talk to the latter. Watch the cutscene and you will receive a Ditto Flag after.

    <td>
    
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430542/164c5b98ea3325c9fcd5a7abcc48277a.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Place Ditto Flag on your house" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430542/164c5b98ea3325c9fcd5a7abcc48277a.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_102">Rebuild the Pokemon Center </h4>
<table class="a-table a-table " style="">
  <tbody><tr>
    <th width="10%">#</th>
    <th width="90%">Step by Step Objectives</th>
  </tr>
  
  
  <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430549/813aac9a389e9ad9a53fd0ce2f0095a8.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Pokemon Center Building Kit" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430549/813aac9a389e9ad9a53fd0ce2f0095a8.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Professor Tangrowth and he will ask you to obtain a building kit for the Pokemon Center. Raise your environment level to three in order to unlock the building kit at the Shop.
    </td>
  </tr>
 
   <tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431313/300350aaad059a1fff8c281158301eaf.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Pokemon Center Rebuilding Kit" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431313/300350aaad059a1fff8c281158301eaf.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
After raising the environment level to three and gathering enough Life Coins, go to the PC and select Shop. Scroll down and purchase the Pokemon Center Rebuilding Kit for 1000 Life Coins.
    </td>
  </tr>
     <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431320/295631b06ac80a6d7a4cd037d16bce21.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Pokemon Center Material Requirements" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431320/295631b06ac80a6d7a4cd037d16bce21.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Gather the materials needed to rebuild the Pokemon Center. You will need 20 Lumber, 20 Stones, 10 Leaves, and 10 Vine Ropes.
    </td>
  </tr>
      <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431335/71d17526b88338f15639dd0d1da0c418.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Tree-Shaded Tall Grass habitat" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431335/71d17526b88338f15639dd0d1da0c418.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
To get Lumber, you need to befriend a Pokemon with the <b class="a-bold">Chop Specialty</b> to turn the Small Logs into Lumber. Create a Tree-Shaded Tall Grass habitat to befriend Scyther. Give him Sturdy Sticks to complete his request and unlock the <a class="a-link" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/583508">Cut</a> move. <br> <br>
Talk to Scyther and select <b class="a-bold">Look at this!</b> Choose the Small Logs in the inventory and select <b class="a-bold">Make me some lumber</b>. You only need 2 Small Logs to get 10 Lumber.
    </td>
  </tr>
 
    <tr>
    <th>4</th>
    <td>
At this point, you will need to restore the habitats to befriend new Pokemon in order to complete the rebuilding process.
    </td>
  </tr>
</tbody></table>
<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_103">Unlock Rock Smash and Slowpoke </h4>
<div id="AdThrive_Content_4_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;"><div id="google_ads_iframe_/18190176,134206022/AdThrive_Content_4/6984faaf65436073a652949b_0__container__" style="border: 0pt none; width: 300px; height: 0px;"></div></div><table class="a-table a-table " style="">
  <tbody><tr>

  <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431362/d86912af9c7f9972983660c12b68ec91.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Exercise Resting Spot Habitat" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431362/d86912af9c7f9972983660c12b68ec91.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Place the punching bag next to the bench to restore the Exercise Resting Spot Habitat. Wait for Hitmonchan to appear next to the punching bag and befriend him.
    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431373/8bc162b381ef4be73864b9ea867a7538.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Give Hitmonchan stones" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431373/8bc162b381ef4be73864b9ea867a7538.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Hitmonchan and give him 2 Stones to complete his request and unlock the <a class="a-link" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/583475">Rock Smash</a> move.

</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431383/005ae95846b7dfdd8170036a2202c497.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Squirtle Path" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431383/005ae95846b7dfdd8170036a2202c497.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Squirtle to receive his request. Head west from the destroyed Pokemon Center and destroy the rock blocking the path using <a class="a-link" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/583475">Rock Smash</a>.

</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>4</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431386/03f2e5e575e2b785c963ee2354ca2e07.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Drifloon Beach" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431386/03f2e5e575e2b785c963ee2354ca2e07.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Head west following the shoreline to find Drifloon. Although this is not required to progress the story, completing Drifloon's request unlocks the Dream Island feature. It is recommended to talk to Drifloon to unlock the feature later on.

</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>5</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431394/b01b4c2e6850074bd5fd52fb93c90114.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Geodude Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431394/b01b4c2e6850074bd5fd52fb93c90114.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
    
Continue heading north until you reach Onix located beyond the rocks that you can destroy using Rock Smash. Use the yellow speech bubble as a hint to find his location. Make sure to collect the smooth rocks in the cave, as they are required to build Onix's habitat.

</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>6</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431400/385f5dd5adb219e62af755be3b53db0d.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Professor Tangrowth Other Side of Wall" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431400/385f5dd5adb219e62af755be3b53db0d.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Return to Professor Tangrowth and he will ask you to break the wall to get to the other side. Head towards the cliff where Professor Tangrowth is facing and use <a class="a-link" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/583475">Rock Smash</a> to break the rocks, revealing a new area.

</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>7</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431402/61bd263996567bb0ca02fa3ded4f12a1.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Abandoned Building" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431402/61bd263996567bb0ca02fa3ded4f12a1.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Follow Professor Tangrowth to reach the abandoned building. Talk to him once he reaches the building. Inspect the building to receive the Important Request: "<b class="a-bold">Do the...Team Initiation Challenge?</b>"

</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>8</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431406/7e3749b5909a79ff3e985cad764c65f2.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Seaside Tall Grass" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431406/7e3749b5909a79ff3e985cad764c65f2.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Return home and talk to Professor Tangrowth. He will give you a hint about Slowpoke's habitat, the Seaside Tall Grass.

</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>9</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431409/1bb17c39102be760b69676e7b47309a0.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Slowpoke Habitat" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431409/1bb17c39102be760b69676e7b47309a0.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Head back to the beach where the abandoned building is located and create a Seaside Tall Grass Habitat by placing four patches of grass on the beach side.
</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>10</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431417/afc61034f8035f54acccedc93cceb4a9.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Slowpoke Make it rain." data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431417/afc61034f8035f54acccedc93cceb4a9.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Slowpoke and accept his request. To fulfill Slowpoke's request, you need to befriend Scyther first. <br> <br> If you have befriended and completed Scyther's request beforehand, you can talk to Slowpoke and choose <b class="a-bold">Make it rain!</b> to unlock the recipe for Wooden Steps.

  <tr>
    <th>11</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431423/7af78b827b1c9e6c84cf5b6722bb70db.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Guide Slowpoke to the Pokemon Center" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431423/7af78b827b1c9e6c84cf5b6722bb70db.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
To help Slowpoke travel to the Pokemon Center, use Water Gun to water the dry paths and place Wooden Steps on the uneven surfaces. Since Slowpoke moves slowly, you can talk to him first, have him move, and then prepare the path.
</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>12</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431425/17e082e00772577d181b0810ae562c89.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Slowpoke" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431425/17e082e00772577d181b0810ae562c89.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Once Slowpoke reaches the Pokemon Center, talk to him and watch the cutscene that follows to unlock the Important Request: <b class="a-bold">Yawn Up a Storm!</b>
</td>
  </tr>
</tbody></table>

 <tr>

 <tr>

 <tr>

<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_105">Finish Rebuilding the Pokemon Center </h4>
<table class="a-table a-table " style="">
  <tbody><tr>
    <th width="10%">#</th>
    <th width="90%">Step by Step Objectives</th>
  </tr>
    <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431604/35fbe8deadef3e6fd40728bf0e4d9b0c.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="7 Pokemon Requirements" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431604/35fbe8deadef3e6fd40728bf0e4d9b0c.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
After rescuing Onix, you can start rebuilding the Pokemon Center. Gather Onix and 7 other Pokemon to start rebuilding and collect 20 Lumber, 20 Stones, 10 Leaves, and 10 Vine Ropes for the materials. <br> <br> <span class="a-red">Rebuilding the Pokemon Center requires waiting until tomorrow in real-world time</span>, but you can skip this by changing your Switch 2's system time.
</td>
  </tr>
    <tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431606/73edd2ec045c0bdbb4b5547cb3d1d3d9.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Rebuilt Pokemon Center" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431606/73edd2ec045c0bdbb4b5547cb3d1d3d9.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431663/b0ec780777792bff4cda2aa16e4eddb3.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Gate leading to Bleak Beach" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431663/b0ec780777792bff4cda2aa16e4eddb3.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  </tr>
    <tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431665/e41edea8e8257f5feb3939888b2ba27a.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Leave the other side of the gate" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431665/e41edea8e8257f5feb3939888b2ba27a.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Leave the other side of the gate to enter Bleak Beach.

  </tr>
   <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431675/129bad143c7d7ea20bf61546bcb8ddc1.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Professor Tangrowth near destroyed bridge" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431675/129bad143c7d7ea20bf61546bcb8ddc1.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Follow and talk to Professor Tangrowth once he reaches the destroyed bridge.

  </tr>
   <tr>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431681/206f9456630fa49f514a0317a4215e1c.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Use bridge planks to construct the bridge" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431681/206f9456630fa49f514a0317a4215e1c.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Use the Workbench to craft Bridge Planks. Use the Bridge Planks to connect the two bridges together to allow Professor Tangrowth to cross.

  </tr>
   <tr>
    <th>5</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431682/fc4218f5cd4e094e9e6adf1a1ac3935b.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Professor Tangrowth near ruined Pokemon Center" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431682/fc4218f5cd4e094e9e6adf1a1ac3935b.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<hr class="a-table__line">
Use a block, such as Beach Sand, and place it north of the destroyed Pokemon Center to remove the water surrounding it.

  </tr>

   <tr>
    <th>7</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431819/8c9bc7ee583745f5797393e816175a03.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Check the PC" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431819/8c9bc7ee583745f5797393e816175a03.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_201">Complete Meowth's Requests </h4>

  <tbody><tr>

  </tr>
  
  
    <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431825/6b845a02a15040f59045ff6122c17297.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Meowth" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431825/6b845a02a15040f59045ff6122c17297.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Talk to Meowth near Professor Tangrowth and follow him towards the shack.

  </tr>

    <tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>

Talk to Meowth once he is submerged in the water to begin his request.
</td>
  </tr>

    <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432286/e7b353a747a15bae2f78eb7a850a0a92.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Place blocks at Meowth" s="" house'="" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432286/e7b353a747a15bae2f78eb7a850a0a92.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Place blocks behind Meowth's house to stop the water from flowing into it to complete the request and unlock the Resting Spot habitat.

  </tr>
  
     <tr>
    <th>4</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431836/7806ae8437feb11fae57cf355f96f104.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Tropical Vibes habitat" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431836/7806ae8437feb11fae57cf355f96f104.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

The next step requires you to befriend two Pokemon. Inspect the glowing spots on the floor to receive habitat hints in the area. Use Rototiller to place seashore flowers next to the tropical tree to create a Tropical Vibes habitat.
</td>
  </tr>
    
     <tr>
    <th>5</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431841/784c1c8d56ff8fe2c566befce740c0a1.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Knitting Station" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431841/784c1c8d56ff8fe2c566befce740c0a1.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

</td>
  </tr>
     <tr>
    <th>6</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432329/628f4ca2758b5ea3f3afd69c56ca4b80.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Meowth yellow speech bubble" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432329/628f4ca2758b5ea3f3afd69c56ca4b80.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  </tr>
  
      <tr>

Use the workbench to create two Mushroom Lamps and place them in Meowth's house. This furniture requires Glowing Mushrooms which you can get from nearby caves.
</td>
  </tr>
  
     <tr>
    <th>8</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432335/65e51ae2ea662fc7a44350977539c0f1.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Meowth yellow speech bubble 2" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432335/65e51ae2ea662fc7a44350977539c0f1.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  </tr>
     <tr>
    <th>9</th>
    <td>

  </tr>
  
     <tr>
    <th>10</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431849/c79f00b11aa94924add885c0b85f44a9.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Spray mud with bubbles" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431849/c79f00b11aa94924add885c0b85f44a9.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

After talking to Piplup, take him to the muddy area in front of Meowth's house and have him spray bubbles on you.

      <tr>

    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431851/2b6f79dedb51a0ca0a132ed57c3ee5f9.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Use Water Gun on the mud" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431851/2b6f79dedb51a0ca0a132ed57c3ee5f9.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">

</td>
  </tr>
  
      <tr>
    <th>12</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431865/aa5fe69774e2ff04d0864a9324f6562c.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Chirp chirp meal" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431865/aa5fe69774e2ff04d0864a9324f6562c.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Build a Chirp-Chirp Meal habitat to befriend Torchic. Most of the furniture required to make the habitat are located in front of Meowth's house.

  </tr>
  
      <tr>
    <th>13</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432341/73e503f6b4098afe0af80845338931fd.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Torchic Squishy Clays" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432341/73e503f6b4098afe0af80845338931fd.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Torchic to have him process the Squishy Clay into Bricks. Use Rock Smash on nearby clay blocks to obtain Squishy Clays.

  </tr>
  
      <tr>

    <hr class="a-table__line">

  </tr>
  
      <tr>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432365/4cd9761a2c77a1e9194581fd9e38476b.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Put flowers on planter" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432365/4cd9761a2c77a1e9194581fd9e38476b.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Plant flowers in the Planters that you have places. You can plant seeds and grow them or use Rototiller to plant flowers directly on it. Talk to Meowth after to complete the request.

  </tr>
  
      <tr>

    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432351/1a5f9159e5f95c9f5f643c6633f21797.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Professor Tangrowth Build a house" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432351/1a5f9159e5f95c9f5f643c6633f21797.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Talk to Professor Tangrowth and accept his request.

  </tr>
  
       <tr>

    <td>

    <hr class="a-table__line">
Build any house in the area and place three pieces of furniture inside. Any house will work, so use either the Leaf Den or Sand Den. <br> <br> The Pokemon that appears in the Tree-Shaded Yellow Tall Grass habitat has the Builder Specialty. Make sure to befriend one to help you build the house.
</td>
  </tr>
  
     <tr>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432491/7c3d4031d9d6d8c02c06deb600f0770c.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Professor Tangrowth after building the house" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432491/7c3d4031d9d6d8c02c06deb600f0770c.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <tr>

    <th>2</th>
    <td>

<hr class="a-table__line">
Create the Trash Collection Site habitat to befriend Trubbish. Give him the Nonburnable Garbage to convert it into Iron Ore. You will receive the recipe for the Shower when doing so.

  </tr>
  
    <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431947/c19ccb5222c7e9f722861c76c104a6cf.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Place the Shower" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431947/c19ccb5222c7e9f722861c76c104a6cf.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <tr>
    <th>4</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4431948/41be6f83e6ded7ff2a39a3ee78390e0f.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Breezy Flower Bed Habitat" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4431948/41be6f83e6ded7ff2a39a3ee78390e0f.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <tr>

    <td>

    <td>

  </tr>

    <td>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432641/a4621e906a51ff97f2e1dde2f66cefd1.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Complete Lapras" s="" request'="" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432641/a4621e906a51ff97f2e1dde2f66cefd1.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  </tr>

    <td>

  </tr>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432509/81f6ae4d07de22e47051343b1432befa.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Trubbish yellow speech bubble" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432509/81f6ae4d07de22e47051343b1432befa.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432525/f835d90e6dd6d7ba2cf128f374510fb2.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Mosslax Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432525/f835d90e6dd6d7ba2cf128f374510fb2.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  <tr>

  </tr>

Talk to Professor Tangrowth after completing Torchi's request to activate a cutscene.

Head over to the fallen Pokemon to befriend Peakychu.</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>

    <td>

    <th>14</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432821/6822a8ac140b24499edbcc86e3b2c6e9.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Shell Lamp Activated" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432821/6822a8ac140b24499edbcc86e3b2c6e9.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Have Pawmi or any Pokemon that can generate electricity follow you to light up the Shell Lamp and complete the request.

</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>15</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432144/bcfd6ae1888d6a0b9a7aebe65c954b02.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Peakychu near windmill" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432144/bcfd6ae1888d6a0b9a7aebe65c954b02.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Follow Peakychu towards the windmill. Once he stops and a yellow speech bubble appears, talk to him.

</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>16</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432145/621d864aefe091bfcc2bc0237e061142.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Place the Utility Pole" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432145/621d864aefe091bfcc2bc0237e061142.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Collect the nearby Utility Pole and connect it to the wind turbine. If you place the utility pole with a thin wire still connected, you can place the utility pole connected to the wind turbine. Talk to Peakychu after.

</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>17</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432146/9959e619dcfa5e776248dafd9253a6e2.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Harbor Streetlight" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432146/9959e619dcfa5e776248dafd9253a6e2.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Collect the Harbor Streelight nearby and place it near the Utility Pole that has electricity. Placing the Harbor Streetlight near the Utility Pole will light up and illuminate the town.

</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>18</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432879/f48045554239e01768fea425b15ac805.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Peakychu Yellow Speech Bubble" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432879/f48045554239e01768fea425b15ac805.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Wait for Peakychu to walk all the way to Mosslax's location. Talk to him once the yellow speech bubble appears.

</td>
  </tr>  

  
  <tr>
    <th>19</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432880/946d07a52e22f2f6caa0ca5916b7441d.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Connect the charging station" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432880/946d07a52e22f2f6caa0ca5916b7441d.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Follow Peakychu to head to a charging station. Place a Utility Pole and connect it to the other Utility Poles that are powered by the windmill to activate it. Talk to Peakychu after to complete the request and unlock another request: <b class="a-bold">Power up the charging station</b>.

</td>
  </tr>  


   <tr>
    <th>20</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432881/d8368de32d053049b64ba9ce7e646234.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Torchic I" ll="" help="" make="" electricity'="" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432881/d8368de32d053049b64ba9ce7e646234.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Torchic once he has the <b class="a-bold">"I'll help make electricity!"</b> speech bubble to receive his request.
</td>
  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>21</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432886/047e187f19286b8ccd30af6625712f66.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Furnace Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432886/047e187f19286b8ccd30af6625712f66.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Take Torchic with you and search for the Furnace located at the southwest side of the map. Place Utility Poles to power up the Furnace.
</td>
  </tr>

   <tr>
    <th>22</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432887/dac7a76d41a7d0b8f3de0b95dc224167.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Add Lumber and Sturdy Sticks in the Furnace" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432887/dac7a76d41a7d0b8f3de0b95dc224167.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Inspect the furnace and add burnable materials such as Lumber and Sturdy Sticks. Select Burn to generate electricity from it and complete the request.
</td>
  </tr>

   <tr>
    <th>23</th>
    <td>
    
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432888/0919345fb5c323f86ff03ab0ca0e98cb.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Piplup I wish I could help" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432888/0919345fb5c323f86ff03ab0ca0e98cb.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

</td>
  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>24</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432893/58eb2ae89657c9e512a92ebae5bb18ba.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Waterwheel Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432893/58eb2ae89657c9e512a92ebae5bb18ba.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

   <tr>
    <th>25</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432894/4bfb6ac9937e7de546e2caf307cfab6b.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Second water wheel location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432894/4bfb6ac9937e7de546e2caf307cfab6b.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  </tr>
  
   <tr>

    <td>
Talk to Trubbish near Mosslax's cave to receive his request.
</td>
  </tr>
  
    <tr>
    <th>26</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432851/2395356c64284aeb091c7665740568b8.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Take Trubbish to the lighthouse" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432851/2395356c64284aeb091c7665740568b8.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

   <tr>
    <th>27</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432896/5a23208c81559ce9a7544b5b9dd5727b.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Peakychu This time for sure" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432896/5a23208c81559ce9a7544b5b9dd5727b.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Connect the water wheel, furnace, and the windmill to the charging station using the Utility Poles. You can proceed to the next objective once Peakychu has the <b class="a-bold">"This time for sure.."</b>*
yellow speech bubble above his head. <br> <br> Talk to Peakychu again for a cutscene. You should be able to interact with Mosslax in his cave after.
</td>
  </tr>
  
    <tr>
    <th>28</th>
    <td>
If you have not reached 100 Bloom Points, use lights, spotlights, and flames to light up the entire city. Explore the area and light up lights that are not lit and connect them to utility poles.
</td>
  </tr>
  
    <tr>
    <th>29</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432161/54d0c6352d08ca111c154ac0dfe9e4ff.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Raikou" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432161/54d0c6352d08ca111c154ac0dfe9e4ff.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Once you have reached 100 Bloom Points, climb to the top and talk to Raikou. After talking to Raikou, talk to Mosslax to complete the important request.
</td>
  </tr>
  
    <tr>
    <th>30</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432898/87530f2f9dd894e5b7bb26e159a05ffa.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="North Gate" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432898/87530f2f9dd894e5b7bb26e159a05ffa.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
After completing the important request, head to the gate on the north side. Open the gate and go to the next area. Note that you can only pass through the gate once you have finished both Bleak Beach and Rocky Ridges.
</td>
  </tr>

    <th width="90%">Step by Step Objectives</th>
  </tr>
    <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433624/51784947e4e14b08b2b4668c90cc3467.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Rocky Ridges Location Map" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433624/51784947e4e14b08b2b4668c90cc3467.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Head to the northwest gate in Withered Wasteland to enter the Rocky Ridges. Once you enter the gate, Professor Tangrowth will follow you.
</td>
  </tr>
  

    <tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433625/852ca7d768b32eec744342db8df79964.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Follow Professor Tangrowth" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433625/852ca7d768b32eec744342db8df79964.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Once you enter the area, a cutscene will occur. Follow Professor Tangrowth as he moves forward.

  </tr>

    <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433634/c6982374135079952d618c1d9fd536f7.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Examine the PC" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433634/c6982374135079952d618c1d9fd536f7.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Go west through the area and examine the PC. A cutscene will occur after you examine it.

  </tr>

    <th>4</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433636/e9638dcc60a8b1c11a4ff346f9bf90c3.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Professor Tangrowth Yellow speech bubble" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433636/e9638dcc60a8b1c11a4ff346f9bf90c3.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Wait until a yellow speech bubble appears above Professor Tangrowth. Talk to him once it appears.

  </tr>

    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432981/48e2587ec56749d47d2e1a34bcce8fb7.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Red Tall Grass" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432981/48e2587ec56749d47d2e1a34bcce8fb7.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <td>

    <tr>

    <td>

  </tr>
  
    <tr>
    <th>8</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433650/dbe7ec0b2f4e559ca605a1948adb6653.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Grassy Training Field habitat" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433650/dbe7ec0b2f4e559ca605a1948adb6653.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Collect sandbags near the workbench across the PC to create the Grassy Training Field habitat. <br> <br> Note that <span class="a-red">placing a sandbag near the Red Tall Grass where Scorbunny lives will not create a Grassy Training Field</span>. You need to place a second 2x2 patch of red grass and the two sandbags for it to work.
</td>
  </tr>
  
    <tr>
    <th>9</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433657/695477ee30d24925ba4442359b657d1a.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Rustling Grass at Grassy Training Field" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433657/695477ee30d24925ba4442359b657d1a.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Examine the rustling grass at the Grassy Training Field to befriend Machoke.
</td>
  </tr>
  
    <tr>
    <th>10</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432985/83cf258139c42407bd87ad536f7be555.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Follow Machoke" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432985/83cf258139c42407bd87ad536f7be555.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Follow Machoke and talk to him again to receive his request.
</td>
  </tr>
  
     <tr>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432987/d908b545292f6389d5f187f3ff20eed0.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Gather 5 Stones" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432987/d908b545292f6389d5f187f3ff20eed0.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Once Machoke's request begins, pick up five stones from the surrounding area. Once you have picked them up, go back to Machoke to learn Strength.
</td>
  </tr>
  
  
     <tr>
    <th>12</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432993/dc1a527b4bca0883124f834e4e205b06.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Pull boulder using Strength" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432993/dc1a527b4bca0883124f834e4e205b06.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
After learning Strength, carry the nearby giant rock to Machoke. Hold down the A Button while moving in front of the giant rock to use Strength. You cannot use Strength by holding down ZR.
</td>
  </tr>
  
     <tr>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433662/33f0edf90e63e68cf6dc3cc01a785e16.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Machoke again after you deliver the giant boulder" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433662/33f0edf90e63e68cf6dc3cc01a785e16.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Machoke again after you deliver the giant boulder.

    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433676/e5bd4e630110d9bebe89372a830689f4.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Push the PC to the socket" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433676/e5bd4e630110d9bebe89372a830689f4.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
