<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_301">Rescue Chef Dente </h4>
<div id="AdThrive_Content_11_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;"></div><table class="a-table a-table " style="">
  <tbody><tr>
    <th width="10%">#</th>
    <th width="90%">Step by Step Objectives</th>
  </tr>


<tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433677/3cbefa30281b9191f979bf4ebdd35647.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Professor Tangrowth after restoring the PC" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433677/3cbefa30281b9191f979bf4ebdd35647.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Professor Tangrowth after restoring the PC.
</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433679/e798d07efd78c39eb6fca4e29f65bf63.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Follow Professor Tangrowth after the cutscene ends" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433679/e798d07efd78c39eb6fca4e29f65bf63.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Follow Professor Tangrowth after the cutscene ends.
</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4432997/9038c6e85dacc134e170dc11c31617be.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Use Cut on the Chain" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4432997/9038c6e85dacc134e170dc11c31617be.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Climb onto the wooden box and use Cut to cut the chain hanging from the barrel. This gives you a hint of a new habitat, Pointy Tree-Shaded Rocky Tall Grass.
</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>4</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433715/af0261542e928ca0eac7932e982801ad.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Pointy Tree-Shaded Rocky Tall Grass" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433715/af0261542e928ca0eac7932e982801ad.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Head to the southwestern side of the map and use Strength to place a boulder next to the pointy tree. Place 4 Red Tall Grass to create the Pointy Tree-Shaded Rocky Tall Grass habitat.
</td>
  </tr>
  
  
<tr>
    <th>5</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433746/25622f710c86509435178d70571b3c43.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Examine the swaying grass at the Pointy Tree-Shaded Rocky Tall Grass" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433746/25622f710c86509435178d70571b3c43.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Examine the swaying grass at the Pointy Tree-Shaded Rocky Tall Grass habitat to befriend Dartrix.
</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>6</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433761/9a060ea16a6b9b554915b5a0de50e106.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Perch Recipe Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433761/9a060ea16a6b9b554915b5a0de50e106.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Dartrix and choose <b class="a-bold">"Can you make cutting boards?</b>. You will receive a request first to craft the Perch. The recipe for Perch can be obtained from the golden Poke Ball near the workbench.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>7</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433011/942a3ebb76f6405e2d78d045726e22e3.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Perch Material Requirements" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433011/942a3ebb76f6405e2d78d045726e22e3.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Create the Perch using 2 Small Logs and 1 Leaf and place it near Dartrix. Doing so completes the request and unlocks the recipe for the Cutting Board.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>8</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433781/f4c2ad606ec45b2278e6562a92c90616.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Cutting Board Requirements" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433781/f4c2ad606ec45b2278e6562a92c90616.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
  Give Lumber to Dartrix to create the material needed for the Cutting Board. After that, go to the workbench and craft the Cutting Board using 2 Lumbers.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>9</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433782/03a35e9950e014675c8c1763839aff96.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Making Simple Salad" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433782/03a35e9950e014675c8c1763839aff96.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Place the Cutting Board nearby and make a Simple Salad using two Leaves.
</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>10</th>
    <td>
    
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433783/48f0aac6d72b3ed1781d732dda5cff62.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Eat the Simple Salad" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433783/48f0aac6d72b3ed1781d732dda5cff62.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Eat the Simple Salad you made to strengthen the effect of Leafage. Using the move after eating the Simple Salad allows you to place grass over a wider area and also grow moss and aquatic plants. 
<br> <br>

Hold down ZR to use the strengthened version of Leafage. Note that there is a limit to the number of times you can use this, so it is recommended to make a lot of Simple Salads.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>11</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433787/d0f4188a87d3ae45060f9be8c88f915c.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Mossy Hot Spring" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433787/d0f4188a87d3ae45060f9be8c88f915c.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
After eating the Simple Salad, talk to Professor Tangrowth to obtain a hint for a new habitat: Mossy Hot Spring It is recommended to craft some wooden stairs at the workbench beforehand in preparation for a request that will appear later.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>12</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433808/231c0c2cfcb832108b9dfa5772bfd605.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Use Rock Smash to enter the western cave" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433808/231c0c2cfcb832108b9dfa5772bfd605.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Use Rock Smash to enter the western cave and create the Mossy Hot Spring habitat inside. Place 4 Moss Plants near the water to make the habitat.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>13</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433845/80157aef6c0aec0288ad077b9a8e07cb.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Examine the swaying moss" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433845/80157aef6c0aec0288ad077b9a8e07cb.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Examine the swaying moss at the Mossy Hot Spring habitat to befriend Torkoal. Talk to Torkoal to receive the request.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>14</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433880/525b008611fe6a6c4761c4c4de85e41f.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Moss path for Torkoal" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433880/525b008611fe6a6c4761c4c4de85e41f.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Start creating a path from the Mossy Hot Spring to the Pokemon Center. Place the stairs and create moss to make it easy for Torkoal to move without stopping to take breaks. You can grow moss by using Leafage while under the effects of Simple Salad.

<br> <br>
Once you have prepared the path, talk to Torkoal to move.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>15</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433883/245f20b15c41f29ce6c71ec25f987a00.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Torkoal once it arrives to the Pokemon Center" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433883/245f20b15c41f29ce6c71ec25f987a00.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Torkoal once it arrives to the Pokemon Center to receive the recipe for the Bread Oven.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>16</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433887/a1e368eadc26e82542c5920d8f8ebb7f.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Volcanic ash" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433887/a1e368eadc26e82542c5920d8f8ebb7f.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Have 2 Stones, 2 Small Logs, and 4 Volcanic Ashes to create the Bread Oven. You can get Volcanic Ash by using Rock Smash at the black soil east of the Pokemon Center.  <br> <br> Place the Bread Oven and have Torkoal or Scorbunny light the fire on it.
</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>17</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433917/87687aafd6c166de8c10c398a431ddcc.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Destroy the rocks that are blocking the water on the hill" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433917/87687aafd6c166de8c10c398a431ddcc.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Grow Wheat at the fields southwest of the map. Destroy the rocks that are blocking the water on the hill and this allows the water to flow. You can also grow wheat by using Water Gun to raise the water level.
</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>18</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433931/37ebf1eda520fd324538c586411acc52.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Making bread" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433931/37ebf1eda520fd324538c586411acc52.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Once you have three pieces of Wheat, inspect the Bread Oven and place three Wheat to make Simple Bread.
</td>
  </tr>
  
 <tr>
    <th>19</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433934/e6d827143c01e853f1f094e049c9e846.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Eating Simple Bread" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433934/e6d827143c01e853f1f094e049c9e846.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Eat the bread to strengthen your Cut move and allow you to cut through solid objects such as chains and wire mesh.
</td>
  </tr>
  
 <tr>
    <th>20</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433936/3a232475dc608af902bd911b4fd1677d.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Cut the chain on the barrel" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433936/3a232475dc608af902bd911b4fd1677d.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Go to the location of the hanging barrel and cut the chain with Cut. Once you cut the chain from the barrel, a cutscene will occur and you will rescue Chef Dente in the process.
</td>
  </tr>
</tbody></table>

  <tr>

    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434008/e4555115343065ffb5d01de769b799f5.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Copper Ore" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434008/e4555115343065ffb5d01de769b799f5.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
After befriending Magmar, you can put copper ore in the smelting furnace to create ingots. You can harvest copper from the blocks that have ore in it using Rock Smash.

  <tr>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434013/25edb85fb0367f970129bf1ac4bd5c74.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Frying Pan Material Requirements" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434013/25edb85fb0367f970129bf1ac4bd5c74.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434053/6dc74b63ddd6a90e6a2d0f7e925d8302.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Beans" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434053/6dc74b63ddd6a90e6a2d0f7e925d8302.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434056/3e0ffcdc8f8a537eb39847b072a8eda1.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Eat the Simple Hamburger Steak" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434056/3e0ffcdc8f8a537eb39847b072a8eda1.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

    <td>

    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434057/6e963ef76e819c02b7238b86cb3c1b41.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Mossy Boulder habitat" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434057/6e963ef76e819c02b7238b86cb3c1b41.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Create the Mossy Boulder habitat in the cave with the hot spring. Place 4 moss around the mossy boulder.

  <tr>
    <th>15</th>
    <td>
    
        <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433989/ac8f57a3a40649f3c74ccefdf4c95f82.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Graveler Mossy Boulder" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433989/ac8f57a3a40649f3c74ccefdf4c95f82.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Examine the swaying moss at the Mossy Boulder habitat to befriend Graveler. You will also receive the new <a class="a-link" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/585151">Rollout</a> move when you talk to him.
</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>16</th>
    <td>
After learning Rollout, talk to Machoke and Graveler. Talking to Graveler completes the request.
</td>
  </tr>
  
  
  <tr>
    <th>17</th>
    <td>
Talk to Professor Tangrowth and he will tell you to raise the Environment Level to 3. Check the PC to see your current Environment Level. <br> <br> If your Environment Level is 3 or higher, you can move on to the next objective. If not, you need to befriend more Pokemon and increase their comfort level.
</td>
  </tr>

<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_303">Time to Party! Request Walkthrough </h4>
<div id="AdThrive_Content_13_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;"></div><table class="a-table a-table " style="">
  <tbody><tr>
    <th width="10%">#</th>
    <th width="90%">Step by Step Objectives</th>
  </tr>


<tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434059/8ee76bec5e8baffcff6e88b9a0740b9d.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Scorbunny near the Pokemon Center" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434059/8ee76bec5e8baffcff6e88b9a0740b9d.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Scorbunny near the Pokemon Center and eat a Simple Hamburger Steak to strengthen your Rock Smash move. Break the wall and proceed through the cave.

</td>
  </tr>
  
<tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434060/cc1e4dc5e689a757e4bf9feb53f40566.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Examine the radio" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434060/cc1e4dc5e689a757e4bf9feb53f40566.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Proceed through the cave by smashing through the blocks using <a class="a-link" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/583475">Rock Smash</a> and examine the radio at the back for a cutscene.

</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434063/8b8f7260003bb9e30161defd591037e4.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Report to Scorbunny" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434063/8b8f7260003bb9e30161defd591037e4.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Exit the cave and report to Scorbunny.
</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>4</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434064/f2747df5a30fde4cb405d664ad9157b0.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to DJ Rotom" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434064/f2747df5a30fde4cb405d664ad9157b0.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to DJ Rotom outside of the cave to start the important request: <b class="a-bold">Time to Party!</b>
</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>
    <th>5</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433444/6679490c9c7350e5915ad202ebbb96b9.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Party Cooking Pot" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433444/6679490c9c7350e5915ad202ebbb96b9.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Chef Dente to receive a Party Cooking Pot.
</td>
  </tr>
  
  <tr>

    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434069/f6bb8bbf9b861f04a7203269da9a1ab2.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Find a large lost relic and have Professor Tangrowth appraise it" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434069/f6bb8bbf9b861f04a7203269da9a1ab2.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

 <tr>

 <tr>

 <tr>

 <tr>

  </tr>
  
 <tr>

  </tr>
  
 <tr>
    <th>19</th>
    <td>
    
Make 5 dishes of your choice to put on the Party Platter. It is recommended to make simple Simple Salad, as you will need to use Wheat and Beans later on.
</td>
  </tr>
  
 <tr>
    <th>20</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434086/e6024aa3d3d70481680544336221cf50.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Five Party Platters" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434086/e6024aa3d3d70481680544336221cf50.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

After placing the Party Platters, talk to Chef Dente.

 <tr>

  </tr>
  
 <tr>

    <td>

  </tr>
  
 <tr>
    <th>25</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434093/c6d261e550379991ce0e3486faefc58b.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Curry Ingredients" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434093/c6d261e550379991ce0e3486faefc58b.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  </tr>
  
 <tr>
    <th>26</th>
    <td>

   <tr>

    <td>

  </tr>
     <tr>
    <th>28</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434099/5df649366c4016d13a2cfd5269f8f229.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Volcanion" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434099/5df649366c4016d13a2cfd5269f8f229.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">

  </tr>
  
     <tr>
    <th>29</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434100/dc141fa0688e893f011ddeed52972eed.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Professor Tangrowth near the Party Pot" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434100/dc141fa0688e893f011ddeed52972eed.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_400">Enter the Gate and Restore the PC </h4>
<div id="AdThrive_Content_14_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;"></div><table class="a-table a-table " style="">
  <tbody><tr>
    <th width="10%">#</th>
    <th width="90%">Step by Step Objectives</th>
  </tr>
  
  
    <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>

<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_401">Learn Glide from Dragonite </h4>
<div id="AdThrive_Content_15_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;"></div><table class="a-table a-table " style="">
  <tbody><tr>
    <th width="10%">#</th>
    <th width="90%">Step by Step Objectives</th>
  </tr>
  
  
    <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
    
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434471/bcbae1665961546786e0cb7fa725348a.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Dinghy Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434471/bcbae1665961546786e0cb7fa725348a.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Build the Waterside Dinghy habitat by placing 1 Canoe and 2 Duckweeds at a high-up location in the water. Head east from the Pokemon Center to reach a high-up location. Eat a Plain Salad to power up your Leafage to spawn Duckweeds near the Canoe.
</td>
  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>
    
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434503/8a1a7702f0429e32459f78d01b736847.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Talk to Dragonite" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434503/8a1a7702f0429e32459f78d01b736847.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Talk to Dragonite to learn Glide. Talk to him again to practive using the move.
</td>
  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>3</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434504/f4f4316a830caaba7997a8691a681734.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Glide with Dragonite" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434504/f4f4316a830caaba7997a8691a681734.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Use Glide to move to the next island and talk to Dragonite. You need PP to use Glide, so make sure to fill up the meter first.
</td>
  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>4</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434237/1d5adbcda17009823d40e1afb0707d62.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Tinkmaster" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434237/1d5adbcda17009823d40e1afb0707d62.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Climb to the top of the tower on the island. When you reach the top, a cutscene will occur and Tinkmaster will ask you to bring six bricks of concrete. You will receive a hint for the habitat, Construction-Site Generator, in order to befriend Conkeldurr.


<hr class="a-table__line">
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434629/db84feda87c34b05b8210539bf7879fc.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Limestone Area" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434629/db84feda87c34b05b8210539bf7879fc.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
It is recommended to gather Limestones at this point, as you will need a lot of Concrete for the next objectives.
</td>
  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>5</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434638/36e9190b58be1b309dd0e74490fafeb6.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Iron Pipes and Iron Scaffold Locations" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434638/36e9190b58be1b309dd0e74490fafeb6.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Head east from the Pokemon Center to find the Furnace. Head to the back of the Furnace to find 1 Iron Pipe and the 2 Iron Scaffolds. Place these materials together to create the Construction-Site Generator to befriend Conkeldurr. 

</td>
  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>6</th>
    <td>
    
        <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434652/88f97adbd4cbf91053e26654701616a1.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Concrete Mixer Recipe" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434652/88f97adbd4cbf91053e26654701616a1.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>7</th>
    <td>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434654/88eff50127ade3673de9dabb292c97e4.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Concrete Mixer Requirements" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434654/88eff50127ade3673de9dabb292c97e4.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Build a Concrete Mixer and place it near the water. You can make the mixer with two Iron Ingots. <br> <br> If you do not have an Iron Smelter, gather iron from nearby areas to build a smelter. Create a Fluffy Flower Garden habitat by placing a 2x2 patch of Skyland Flowers to befriend Vulpix.

  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>8</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434660/a9bfdaec0e10b7ac9ef4d63758d47fd2.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Making Concrete" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434660/a9bfdaec0e10b7ac9ef4d63758d47fd2.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

   <tr>

    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434711/e793639d20a6b06c349cd671c727babb.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Tinkmaster will ask you to get one Iron Ingot" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434711/e793639d20a6b06c349cd671c727babb.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

  </tr>
  
   <tr>

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434745/cd1b25069eb34daef4dbd7c41bdf46bc.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Place the Lift Platform" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434745/cd1b25069eb34daef4dbd7c41bdf46bc.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Create a Lift Platform using 5 Iron Ingots, 5 Concrete, and 1 Tinkagear. Place it so that it connects to the Lift Platform on the other side.

    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434746/29922f6cecdb43d798d986608e40e9af.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Get on the Platform with Tinkmaster." data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434746/29922f6cecdb43d798d986608e40e9af.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

Once you level up the Environment Level, talk to Professor Tangrowth to resume the objective.

    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434780/90504056dfb9f748dfc1924157e4cc52.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Connect the Lift Platform" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434780/90504056dfb9f748dfc1924157e4cc52.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_402">Rebuild the Huge Building! Request Walkthrough </h4>
<div id="AdThrive_Content_16_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;"></div><table class="a-table a-table " style="">
  <tbody><tr>
    <th width="10%">#</th>
    <th width="90%">Step by Step Objectives</th>
  </tr>
  
  
    <tr>
    <th>1</th>
    <td>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434618/bc9fe989a772721ac76edc606cdf5394.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="2nd Floor Building Requirements" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434618/bc9fe989a772721ac76edc606cdf5394.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
<hr class="a-table__line">
Gather the materials and Pokemon needed to build the second floor of the building. You need 25 Concrete, 10 Glass, 5 Pokemetal, 10 Iron Ingots, and 6 Pokemon to help out. 

<hr class="a-table__line"> To make glass, put either Volcanic Ash, Sand, or Sandstone inside a Furnace and have a Pokemon with<a class="a-link" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/585558"> Burn Specialty</a>, such as Vulpix, light the fire.

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434634/c0e94083d69a5dec89faf9a139a7aab1.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Sparkling Skylands Pokemetal Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434634/c0e94083d69a5dec89faf9a139a7aab1.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
 You can mine Pokemetal Fragments on the floating island east of the island with the large building. Befriend Gardevoir to learn of the location.
</td>
  </tr>
  
   <tr>
    <th>2</th>
    <td>
    <div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434617/c86da9fc3bfbe4888fb54c3cfcea170e.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="3rd Floor Building Requirements" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434617/c86da9fc3bfbe4888fb54c3cfcea170e.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
    <hr class="a-table__line">
Gather materials and Pokemon to build the third floor of the building. You need 25 Concrete, 10 Glass, 10 Shiny Stones, and 10 Copper Ingots.
<hr class="a-table__line">

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434008/e4555115343065ffb5d01de769b799f5.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Copper Ore Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434008/e4555115343065ffb5d01de769b799f5.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>


You can get Copper Ore from the caves in Rocky Ridges. Use the Furnace to convert them into Copper Ingots.


<hr class="a-table__line">

<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4434823/3d55884d0b8ed95822f37ff8b91a73a0.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Glowing Stone Cave Location" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4434823/3d55884d0b8ed95822f37ff8b91a73a0.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>
To get Glowing Stones, go to the cave in Rocky Ridges where you meet Magmar and follow the train tracks until you reach the concrete pillars with the Poke Ball logo. Use Rock Smash to punch the surrounding blocks to create an opening. Head inside to reach the cave with plenty of Glowing Stones. You need to eat a Simple Hamburger Steak to destroy the Glowing Stones.
</td>
  </tr>

Chef Dente will teleport next to you.

<p class="a-paragraph"><a class="a-btn" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/585468" style="border-color: ; background-color: ; color: ;"><span>Sparkling Skylands Walkthrough</span></a></p>
<h2 class="a-header--2" id="hl_3">How to Progress the Story</h2><h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_3">Complete All Important Requests to Reach the End Credits</h3>
<div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4433097/4bfd3aa560bb2a65da4b72ab822061e3.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Important Requests" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4433097/4bfd3aa560bb2a65da4b72ab822061e3.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<p class="a-paragraph">Each area in Pokopia has important requests that you need to complete to progress towards the end credits. </p>

<p class="a-paragraph">This includes the main important request that varies each area, rebuilding that area's Pokemon Center, and raising that Environment Level to Level 5. Doing so unlocks the special item that you need to complete the Team Initiation Challenges.</p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Completing all Team Initiation Challenges for all areas unlocks the end credits.</p>
<h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_4">Talk to the Pokemon with Yellow Speech Bubbles</h3>
<div id="AdThrive_Content_17_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;"></div><div class="imageLink js-archive-open-image-modal" data-image-url="https://img.game8.co/4430420/6e4732f62315cd0dbf23ec9a6f281c23.png/original" data-micromodal-trigger="js-archive-open-image-modal" data-archive-url=""><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Speech Bubble" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4430420/6e4732f62315cd0dbf23ec9a6f281c23.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(728px*409/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*409/728);"><span class="imageLink__icon"></span></div>

<p class="a-paragraph">To progress the main story, find and talk to Pokemon with Yellow speech bubbles above them. This speech bubble's subtle yellow outline indicates that talking to the Pokemon will advance the main story.</p>
<h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_5">Review Progress with Professor Tangrowth</h3>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Professor Tangrowth Scene" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4425477/6ded63d567cc593f9f17bed2c2a86b71.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"><br>If you want a reminder of your current requests or what you need to do to move forward, you can talk to <b class="a-bold">Professor Tangrowth</b>. They will remind you what needs to be done if you have an active request.</p>
<h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_6">See List of Requests in the Request Menu</h3>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Requests Menu" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4425523/2aa9a4e29015d2946aff57d78a21d4ba.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"><br>You can also check the menu to see all your requests. Simply open your Pokedex, and you should see the request button among the options. Tap it to see a list of all your active requests so far.</p>
